autoDiscover.title: Auto Discover
autoDiscover.description: Automatically find the PVS6 on your local network via mDNS. When enabled, Host and Serial Number are ignored. If the device becomes unreachable for 2 hours, discovery runs again automatically.

host.title: Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of the PVS6. Ignored when Auto Discover is enabled.

serialNumber.title: Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Full PVS6 serial number. The last 5 characters are used as the login password. Ignored when Auto Discover is enabled.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll the PVS6 for new data. Minimum 5 seconds.

grid.title: Enable Grid Meter accessories (Import + Export pair)

solarName.title: Solar Accessory Display Name
solarName.description: HomeKit display name for the Solar Production accessory.

gridName.title: Grid Import Accessory Display Name
gridName.description: HomeKit display name for the Grid Import accessory.

gridExportName.title: Grid Export Accessory Display Name
gridExportName.description: HomeKit display name for the Grid Export accessory.
